case_title: DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS VS DENLEY, ROBIN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS, MONICA
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DENLEY, ROBIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENLEY, ROBIN BURKS, MONICA $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.00, DEFENDANT MAY MAKE A PAYMENT DIRECTLY TO COURT. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-17-2008 AND ON THE 17TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS AS TO DEFENDANT DENLEY, ROBIN BURKS, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT;CLERK:F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) DEFENDANT MAY MAKE A PAYMENT DIRECTLY TO COURT. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING JANUARY 17TH, 2008, AND ON THE 17TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
